compiled_state.title: RED test: epic-closure validator structural boundary (completion-verifier)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Overview
Write the failing structural boundary test for the epic-closure validator in completion-verifier.md. Per behavioral-testing-standard Rule 5: completion-verifier.md is a non-executable LLM agent instruction file. Tests verify structural presence of validator sections and the ordering contract (validator before compaction).

## File Impact
- Create: tests/skills/test-preconditions-epic-closure-validator.sh

## TDD Requirement
Write test_epic_closure_validator_entry_section_present that checks completion-verifier.md contains an entry validator invocation block (_dso_pv_entry_check).
Write test_epic_closure_validator_exit_section_present that checks completion-verifier.md contains an exit validator invocation block (_dso_pv_exit_write).
Write test_epic_closure_validator_upstream_stage_is_commit that checks the entry section references "commit" as the upstream stage name.
Write test_epic_closure_validator_precedes_compaction that checks the validator write section appears BEFORE the compaction trigger in the agent file (line number check: validator line < compaction line).
Write test_epic_closure_validator_zero_interaction that checks no interactive prompt pattern appears in the new validator sections.

Given/When/Then for test_epic_closure_validator_precedes_compaction:
Given: plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md is read with line numbers
When: finding the line numbers of the validator exit write and the compaction trigger
Then: validator exit write line number < compaction trigger line number (exit 0)

## .test-index RED Markers Required
tests/skills/test-preconditions-epic-closure-validator.sh [test_epic_closure_validator_entry_section_present]
tests/skills/test-preconditions-epic-closure-validator.sh [test_epic_closure_validator_exit_section_present]
tests/skills/test-preconditions-epic-closure-validator.sh [test_epic_closure_validator_upstream_stage_is_commit]
tests/skills/test-preconditions-epic-closure-validator.sh [test_epic_closure_validator_precedes_compaction]
tests/skills/test-preconditions-epic-closure-validator.sh [test_epic_closure_validator_zero_interaction]

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file tests/skills/test-preconditions-epic-closure-validator.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-preconditions-epic-closure-validator.sh
- [ ] All 5 test functions are present
  Verify: grep -c "^test_epic_closure_validator_" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-preconditions-epic-closure-validator.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] Tests FAIL before T10 is applied
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-preconditions-epic-closure-validator.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL\|not found"
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED markers for all 5 functions
  Verify: grep -q '\[test_epic_closure_validator_entry_section_present\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] validate.sh --ci passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
